pages.raw_text:
E. A. Cooney, local organizer of
theh American Federation of Labor
and member of the executive COM
mittee of the Spokane County
Referendum league, is in receipt of
the following letter of encourage
ment from Samuel Gompers, ma
tional head of the federation:


Dear Sir and Brother: Your IA
vor of August 81, together with
copy of Referendum Advocate, to
hand.


In reply would say that the
American Federation of Labor, as
you are aware, has endorsed the
initiative and referendum. 1t has
been put into operation in many
places already, and Is meeting with
considerable success. l hope you
will continue the work as your
time allows you from your other
duties in spreading the principle in
the state of Washington.


| am sending you under separate
cover some official letter paper and
literature.


Wishing you success and best
wishes, remain, Fraternally yours,


ID SAMUEL GOMPERS,


President American Federation


of Labor.
